occupation: Head of Media Sales - Events & OOH at ExCeL London at Excel London
headline: Head of Media Sales - Events & OOH at Excel London with expertise in Commercial Strategies & Revenue Growth
summary:
With a robust foundation in business development and strategic alliances, my role as Head of Media Sales at ExCeL London is to spearhead initiatives that enhance our market position. Our team's focus on developing new business opportunities and nurturing key accounts has consistently led to increased profitability and strengthened client relationships.

My approach is centered around strategic planning and execution, ensuring that sales and marketing activities align with corporate objectives. The sales strategies implemented have not only achieved targets but have also set a benchmark for operational excellence within the events and OOH segments.

experiences.title: Head of Media Sales - Events & OOH at ExCeL London
Senior Media Sales Manager - Events & OOH
Corporate Media Sales Manager
experiences.description: Responsible for identifying potential media sales opportunities across all events.To proactively generate new business and to develop existing key accounts, by identifying and closing businesss across all services. To work closely with the Executive Director on all larger sales campaign and key accounts. Responsibilities - Business Development - Account Management - Sales Administration

experiences.title: Corporate Business Development Manager
experiences.description: - Revenue generation from Corporate Sales. - Presentation and Corporate tie-ups - Content Acquisition. - Corporate tie ups to promote spiritual and devotional content - Generating prospective leads and converting them in to sales

experiences.title: Sr. Manager Business Development
experiences.description: Successfully managed full set up of new business unit for Tendernews.com for selling tender information/business information to worldwide clients in the midst of changing online information environment. Responsible for managing wide variety of clients across a broad range of sectors. Technology Defence Oil & Gas Pharma Construction Airports etc

experiences.description: • Pioneered Tendersinfo.com in the Global Market to establish solid customer base and enhanced brand recognition with greater revenue generation. • Tender Information, RFP, RFQ, Sales and Marketing Management
